## 1. Summary

### 1.1 Problem Statement

Describe the user or business problem this work solves.

### 1.2 Proposed Solution

Describe the change at a high level in 3 to 5 sentences.

### 1.3 Expected Outcome

Describe the user-visible result and the business or product impact.

## 2. Context

| Example: end user | Complete task faster | Too many steps |

### 2.3 Success Metrics

| Metric | Baseline | Target | How Measured |
|--------|----------|--------|--------------|
| Example: task completion rate | 68% | 80% | analytics event |
